episodes.title: Healing Through Wonder: A Cult Survivor's Transformative Moments of Awe
episodes.description:
Co-hosts Robyn Houston-Bean, grief consultant and founder of the Sun Will Rise Foundation, and Val Walker, MS, author, educator, and blogger for Psychology Today, meet with guest, Martha Glory Kartaoui. 

Martha is a speaker, author, trauma-informed coach, and cult survivor. In our conversation, Martha shares her experiences of her transformative moments of awe and wonder during her 26 years in a cult as well as her profound encounters after she escaped. A common thread through her stories is how her sense of awe helped her remember her authentic self and find meaning in her life despite the destructive influences of the cult.

Read more about Martha's "Let Glory Shine" Podcast https://letgloryshine.com  
Visit Martha's Prospera TV Network Channel   https://www.youtube.com/@prosperatvnetwork
Read about Martha's memoir:  Glory: Going All In  https://www.amazon.com/glory-going-survivor-courageous-warrior/dp/b0d4fcdmy4

Learn about Robyn Houston-Bean and The Sun Will Rise Foundation at https://thesunwillrise.org

Read about Val and her books and articles at https://valwalkerauthor.com

Read about Val's latest book, Healing Through Wonder, out with Bloomsbury Publishing, at https://healingthroughwonder.com or go to Amazon at https://www.amazon.com/Healing-Through-Wonder-Restores-Trauma/dp/B0F941HNN9

Healing Through Wonder is available on Audible
subjects: Samanta Roy Institute of Science and Technology
